tech: WordPress, WooCommerce, LMS Plugin, Content Management
title: ChemByNavid
description: A combined e-commerce and learning management system (LMS) website. The platform handles product sales through WooCommerce while also delivering educational content through integrated LMS features, with payment processing and content update workflows.

images.desc: Chemistry resource homepage featuring courses and shop categories.

images.desc: Browse lab equipment, chemicals, and study materials.

images.desc: Enroll in structured chemistry courses with video lessons.
